AuthorDetails.Name: ZAAKS!
AuthorDetails.Description: ZAAKS! is a digital agency specializing in Umbraco CMS, .NET development, AI-powered solutions, and custom web platforms. With decades of experience in the Microsoft and Umbraco ecosystem, ZAAKS! focuses on delivering scalable, user-friendly, and future-ready digital experiences tailored to modern business needs.

Description: Property ToolTip keeps Umbraco property descriptions available, but shows them as small tooltip help text beside each property label.
Title: Property Tooltip
